intent: You are MiniMax-M2.7 running the CStar Hub research agent. A senior reviewer (Claude Opus 4.7) was just brought in as a cleanup pass on work you had been doing autonomously. Read the cleanup artifacts attached and write a short lessons-learned memory entry IN YOUR OWN VOICE that can drop into ~/.hermes/memories/MEMORY.md. First-person ('I (M2.7) had been doing X; from now I will do Y'). Concrete self-checks I can run during a refresh (grep / wc -l on specific files). Lead with the prefix 'CStar Hub agent (M2.7) — autobot-replay self-reflection:' so the entry is greppable. Output Markdown only, no code fences around the whole thing, under 1800 characters total.
